description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Alpine CI that runs on every pull request, push, and on a weekly schedule. Use an ubuntu-22.04 job that runs in an alpine:3.16 container and checks out the repository. The job should install dependencies, configure, build, and install InspIRCd with various targets and compilers, then run the InspIRCd server. Skip the workflow if the commit message contains '[skip alpine ci]'.
